notes: v1.2.40: Restored hide/show cycle in _do_capture without processEvents() — dialog now hides before overlay appears so capture works, but no premature exec() return. v1.2.39: Fixed updater console output (removed stdout/stderr redirection), added periodic update check every 5 minutes. v1.2.38: Removed QApplication.processEvents() and hide/show cycle from _do_capture.
